---
title: "Your Name"
toc: false
about:
  template: trestles
  image: imgs/photo.jpeg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 150px
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/2503322
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:2503322@sit.singaporetech.edu.sg
---

Hi there! I'm a student at the **Singapore Institute of Technology**. Welcome to my personal site.

## About Me

Write something about yourself here — your interests, background, or what you're studying.

## Education

**Singapore Institute of Technology**  
Bachelor of Science in [Your Programme] · 2023 – Present

## Skills

- R / Python
- Data Analysis
- Something else you're good at

## Video

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rphrFDf00mk width="600" height="400" >}}
